reviews.comment:
buena y rapida atecion al cargar nafta. los baños muy limpios. desayune ahi muy lindo el lugar y rica la comida.

(Translated by Google)
Good and fast service when filling up with gas. The restrooms were very clean. I had breakfast there; the place is very nice and the food is delicious.

reviews.comment:
Muy amables todos: los chicos que cargan nafta unos divinos. La empleada de seguros muy amable y eficiente, la gente de taller, rápida y muy calificada. Además está todo en el mismo edificio. Incluido lavado.

(Translated by Google)
Everyone was very friendly: the guys who pump the gas were wonderful. The insurance clerk was very kind and efficient, and the mechanics were quick and highly skilled. Plus, everything is in the same building, including the car wash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBN3BpZzdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
buen servicio en playa de carga de combustible  en el lavadero pésimo mal lavado mal la  terminación y caro excesivo

(Translated by Google)
Good service at the fuel loading dock, terrible service at the car wash, poor finish, and excessively expensive.

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio del Automóvil Club Argentino. Cuenta con innumerables servicios del automotor para socios. Recién remodelado. Cuenta además con una moderna confiteria con muy buen servicio y atención, con precios moderados.

(Translated by Google)
Argentine Automobile Club service station. It offers numerous automotive services for members. Recently renovated. It also features a modern café with excellent service and reasonable prices.
